LanguageData.Apostasy_Despicable.description: Being coerced or otherwise manipulated into following a different belief is a despicable act. If somebody seeks knowledge of another's faith, then let them ask for it naturally.
LanguageData.Apostasy_Despicable.label: despicable
LanguageData.VME_Apostasy_Accepted.description: We feel bound by authority alone to follow our current ideology, and will not think twice if an opportunity presents itself to change our ways.
LanguageData.VME_Apostasy_Accepted.label: accepted
